Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type) Or notDeveloper
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: Number of Lists in this Title: <<Number of Lists>>

Calculation.Text: "View all texts in the whole Title"
Case(IsEmpty(FAT Title::gObjectGroup) ; True; FAT List::Object Group = FAT Title::gObjectGroup)
"This List is used " & FAT List::Number of List instances & " times in this Title."
"View all page items using this List"
FAT List::List backend ≠ "FAT" Or FAT List::List type string = "AI Aspects"

StyledText.Data: Create a List if you want to use all Funkis Cloud features with data sharing and insights. Lists can also be valuable for the Rate block - since the rate values are often used multiple times.

CharacterStyle.Text: Lists can also be valuable for the Rate block - since the rate values are often used multiple times.

ParagraphStyle.Text: Create a List if you want to use all Funkis Cloud features with data sharing and insights.

StyledText.Data: Lists are global in the whole Title and can be used by page items, IOs and IO Input fields.

Calculation.Text: "Create a new list, combining several existing lists - needed for reading multiple Select blocks"
SetProperty ( "list_name" ; "New list" ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title" ) & SetProperty ( "list_template_id" ; FAT List::gListTemplateId )
"Remove IO Group - this will NOT remove any IOs"
"This IO group contain " & FAT Object Group::Number of IOs & " IOs."

StyledText.Data: If you have many Lists - Create Groups and assign each List a group to make authoring easier. Groups are shared between Lists and IOs.
